title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1969 (28.01.1969)
text: REGISTERED No. D. 221 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 17] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, JANUARY 28, 1969/MAGHA 8, 1890 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation. MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th January 1969 G.S.R. 212—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 24 of the Passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1S67), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely:— 1. These rules may be called the Passports (Amendment) Rules, 1969. 2. In Schedule I to the Passports Rules, 1967, for the entries against serial No. 7 the following entries shall be substituted, namely:— "(0) Chief Commissioner, Union The Union territory of the Andaman territory of the Andaman and Nirobar Islands, and Nicobar Islands, Port Blair. ( 43 ) -- 1 of 2 -- 44 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II-SBC. 5(i)] (b) Deputy Commissioner, Union territory of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Port Blair. (c) Chief Secretary, Andaman and Nicobar Administration, Port Blair. The Union territory of the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. do [No. F. VI/401/69/68.] V. H. COELHO, Secy. PRINTED BY THE GENERAL MANAGER, GOVERNMENT OF INDIA PRESS, NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED RY THE MANAGER OF PUBl ICATIONS, DELHI, ] 9 6 9 -- 2 of 2 --
